package.title: Leisure Odisha Golden Triangle Heritage Luxury Escape

highlights.text: Serial code OD-008 | TRAGUIN tour code TRG-ODI-008
State / Country: Odisha / India | Category: Luxury Travel / High- End Leisure
Destinations:
Ideal for: Luxury Families, Discerning Couples, Heritage Enthusiasts
Best season: October to March (Pleasant Coastal Breeze)
Starting price: On Request (Premium Class)
Vehicle / Meals: Private Luxury AC Vehicle / Executive Breakfast & Dinner
TRAGUIN Signature Experience: Private temple priest escort at Puri Jagannath Temple to ensure smooth, respectful VIP entry and specialized darshan assistance.
Curated by TRAGUIN Experts: Perfect balance of daily driving distances and early afternoon check-ins, ideal for premium relaxation.
Premium Handpicked Hotels: Properties selected based on exceptional reviews, safety, beachfront access, and superior culinary excellence.
Luxury Transportation: Chauffeurs fluent in multiple languages who double as expert navigators for hidden local food stops.

itinerary.title: Leisure Odisha Golden Triangle Heritage Luxury Escape
itinerary.tagline: Leisure Odisha Golden Triangle Heritage Luxury Escape
itinerary.overview:
LEISURE ODISHA • GOLDEN TRIANGLE HERITAGE LUXURY ESCAPE Welcome to a timeless realm of divine architecture, golden coastlines, and pristine wilderness, beautifully orchestrated by TRAGUIN. This bespoke Luxury Odisha Holiday is tailored entirely to offer an emotional, deeply moving, and upscale guest-facing encounter with India's best-kept secret. As your expert travel advisors, TRAGUIN translates your getaway into an exquisite tapestry of premium stays, private cultural immersions, and breathtaking landscapes. From the monumental rock-carved temples of Bhubaneswar to the sacred, soul-stirring TRAGUIN Premium Luxury Proposal • OD-008 1 energy of Puri and the architectural poetry of Konark, prepare for an unparalleled voyage that guarantees unforgettable memories.

TOUR OVERVIEW
Travel Dates: Flexible / Custom FIT Choice Group / FIT: Bespoke Private FIT Proposal Vehicle: Premium Chauffeur-driven Luxury AC Sedan / SUV (Innova Crysta) Meal Plan: Modified American Plan (Breakfast and Dinner at handpicked luxury hotels) Route: Bhubaneswar (2 Nights) → Puri (3 Nights via Konark) TRAGUIN Curated Experience Note: This elite itinerary has been conceptualized by TRAGUIN travel planners to showcase the architectural mastery and coastal leisure of Odisha with zero compromises. Enjoy priority VIP monument entrances, private expert-led temple storytelling, and smooth coastal cruising in luxury transportation. DESTINATION HERITAGE & LUXURY INSIGHT Why visit Odisha? Nestled along the Bay of Bengal, Odisha is an architectural wonderland seamlessly fusing ancient spiritual legacies with untouched scenic beauty. It boasts some of the most iconic attractions in Asia, making it a highly requested hotspot for a Luxury Odisha Holiday. For couples looking for a sophisticated, tranquil getaway, an Odisha Honeymoon Package reveals peaceful beach resorts, private cruises, and spectacular sunset photography landmarks. For families, an Odisha Family Tour presents a rich educational journey through centuries of art, sculpture, wildlife, and classical dance traditions. The most searched experiences include witnessing the structural mastery of the Konark Sun Temple—a UNESCO World Heritage Site—and seeking spiritual peace at the holy Jagannath Temple in Puri. Popular Instagram locations range from the ancient hand-carved cells of Udayagiri and Khandagiri caves to the dolphin-spotting waters of Chilika Lake, India's largest coastal lagoon. Whether your passion is premium handpicked hotels, boutique textile shopping, fine local seafood dining, or exploring world-famous tourist places in Odisha, our premium TRAGUIN Odisha Packages ensure an exceptional travel standard during the absolute best time to visit Odisha. THE IMMERSIVE DAY-WISE ITINERARY DAY 01 | ARRIVAL IN BHUBANESWAR WELCOME TO THE TEMPLE CITY – ROYAL ENTRY & HERITAGE RETREAT Your premium Odisha experience begins the moment you step into Biju Patnaik International Airport. Your dedicated private luxury transportation chauffeur welcomes you warmly and escorts you to your premium stay at an ultra-luxury hotel. After a seamless check-in and an afternoon of relaxation, embark on your first exclusive experience: an architectural exploration of the Mukteswar Temple, beautifully celebrated as the 'Gem of Odishan Architecture', followed by the colossal Lingaraj Temple complex. Walk through manicured lawns and witness pristine Kalinga stone-carving artistry under a golden sunset light. TRAGUIN Premium Luxury Proposal • OD-008 2 Sightseeing Included: Mukteswar Temple, Rajarani Temple, Lingaraj Temple (Outer Precincts). Evening Experience: Bespoke high-tea and cultural welcome briefing by a local heritage specialist at the hotel. Overnight Stay: Bhubaneswar (Premium / Luxury Handpicked Hotel) Meals Included: Welcome Mocktails & Gourmet Welcome Dinner DAY 02 | BHUBANESWAR SIGHTSEEING ANCIENT ROCK-CUT CAVERNS & WHITE CHEETAH SAFARI Savor an early, lavish buffet breakfast before diving into a fascinating day of history and nature. Drive to the twin hills of Udayagiri and Khandagiri to explore the beautifully preserved 2nd-century BC rock-cut jain caves, filled with royal inscriptions and striking photography points. In the afternoon, your premium vehicle takes you to the Nandankanan Zoological Park for an immersive private safari to witness the rare, majestic White Tigers. Conclude your evening at Ekamra Haat to browse rare Ikkat silk weaves and authentic filigree craftwork. Sightseeing Included: Udayagiri & Khandagiri Caves, Nandankanan Zoo, Ekamra Haat Cultural Marketplace. Optional Activities: Private masterclass on traditional Pattachitra palm-leaf art with a national awardee artist. Overnight Stay: Bhubaneswar (Premium / Luxury Handpicked Hotel) Meals Included: Bespoke Breakfast & Luxury Multi-Cuisine Dinner DAY 03 | BHUBANESWAR TO PURI (VIA DHAULI & PIPPILI) THE PATH OF PEACE & CRAFT VILLAGES TO THE SACRED COAST Bid farewell to Bhubaneswar and travel along an incredibly scenic route towards the coast. Stop first at Dhauli Hills, the emotionally powerful site of the Kalinga War where Emperor Ashoka embraced Buddhism and peace; sit under the gleaming white Shanti Stupa overlooking plains. Continue through Pippili, a vibrant, colorful artisan village globally famous for its magnificent applique handicraft work. Arrive in the afternoon at the holy beach city of Puri and check into your premium, beachfront luxury resort. Relax to the soothing rhythm of the waves. Sightseeing Included: Dhauli Peace Pagoda, Pippili Applique Village, Private Golden Beach Frontage. Evening Experience: VIP escorted evening visit to the sacred Jagannath Temple with a private family priest. Overnight Stay: Puri (Ultra-Luxury Beachfront Resort Property) Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Coastal Seafood Buffet Dinner DAY 04 | EXCURSION TO KONARK SUN TEMPLE POETRY IN STONE & THE EXQUISITE MARINE DRIVE CRUISE Experience a magical morning cruising along the breathtaking Puri-Konark Marine Drive, bordered by dense casuarina forests and pristine sandy horizons. Arrive at the iconic Konark Sun Temple, a 13th-century architectural masterpiece shaped like a giant celestial chariot. Walk alongside its legendary monolithic wheels as your private TRAGUIN Premium Luxury Proposal • OD-008 3 expert storyteller brings ancient mythology to life. Later, enjoy a relaxing afternoon at Chandrabhaga Beach, followed by an elegant, curated seaside picnic experience. Sightseeing Included: Konark Sun Temple Complex, Chandrabhaga Beach, Puri Marine Drive Highway. Optional Activities: Private sunset beach photography session with a high-end destination photographer. Overnight Stay: Puri (Ultra-Luxury Beachfront Resort Property) Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Sunset Candle-lit Resort Dinner DAY 05 | EXCURSION TO CHILIKA LAKE (SATAPADA) CRUISING THE LAGOON & ENCOUNTERING IRRAWADDY DOLPHINS Awake early to head towards Satapada, the eastern sanctuary of the majestic Chilika Lake. Board a private, premium luxury boat charter designed exclusively for your family. Glide across the calm lagoon waters to spot the elusive Irrawaddy Dolphins leaping gracefully against the morning sky. Cruise to the famous Sea Mouth where Chilika Lake connects into the wide Bay of Bengal. Enjoy a lunch of freshly caught crab or prawns prepared by local fishermen on a secluded island strip before heading back to Puri for a relaxed evening beach walk. Sightseeing Included: Chilika Lagoon Boat Charter, Irrawaddy Dolphin Sanctuary, Sea Mouth Sand Point. Evening Experience: Private sand-art display observation on Puri beach, tailored by local beachfront artists. Overnight Stay: Puri (Ultra-Luxury Beachfront Resort Property) Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Farewell Chef's Tasting Menu Dinner DAY 06 | PURI TO BHUBANESWAR / DEPARTURE CHERISHING THE GOLDEN MEMORIES OF KALINGA Indulge in a final morning buffet breakfast at your resort while enjoying panoramic views of the ocean. Your private luxury vehicle will ensure a smooth, comfortable drive back to Bhubaneswar. If time permits, visit the beautiful Raghurajpur Heritage Crafts Village en route to view authentic Gotipua dance rehearsals. Arrive at Bhubaneswar Airport or Railway Station for your onward journey, taking home unforgettable memories crafted to perfection by TRAGUIN. Transfers Included: Private premium door-to-door highway airport transfer drop-off. Meals Included: Sumptuous Buffet Breakfast TRAGUIN Premium Luxury Proposal • OD-008 4 HANDPICKED PREMIUM ACCOMMODATION OPTIONS CATEGORY BHUBANESWAR STAY (2 NIGHTS) PURI BEACHFRONT STAY (3 NIGHTS) MEAL PLAN & PERKS OPTION 01 – DELUXE Hotel Swosti Grand / similar The Hans Coco Palms / similar MAPAI (Daily Breakfast & Dinner) OPTION 02 – PREMIUM Swosti Premium / Vivanta Bhubaneswar Pramod Convention & Beach Resort MAPAI + Elevated Room View Base OPTION 03 – LUXURY Welcomhotel by ITC / Trident Hotel Mayfair Waves / Mayfair Heritage Puri MAPAI + Executive Club Lounge Perks OPTION 04 – ULTRA LUXURY The Mayfair Lagoon (Executive Villa) Mayfair Waves (Premium Sea Facing Suite) Bespoke Signature Chef- Curated Plan PACKAGE INCLUSIONS ✔ Accommodation: Premium stays in double- sharing luxury rooms across handpicked hotels. ✔ Luxury Transportation: All transfers, intercity cruising, and sightseeing via private AC Innova Crysta. ✔ Meals: Generous daily breakfast spreads and gourmet dinners included at the resorts. ✔ TRAGUIN Support: 24/7 VIP assistance with a dedicated destination guest relations manager. ✔ Welcome Amenities: Cold-pressed standard arrival refreshments and customized family travel kit. ✔ Complimentary Experiences: Private premium boat charter ride for dolphin-spotting at Chilika Lake. ✔ Assistance & Taxes: Tolls, fuel charges, state permits, chauffeur allowance, and all applicable resort taxes. ✔ Sightseeing Access: Pre-arranged seamless logistical routing across all mentioned landmarks. PACKAGE EXCLUSIONS ✘ Flights / domestic airline tickets or long-distance railway tickets to Odisha. ✘ Monument entry tickets, professional guide fees, or temple donation costs. ✘ Personal expenses such as laundry, room service, alcoholic beverages, mini-bar, or phone calls. ✘ Any optional tours, high-end water sports, insurance coverage, or extra activities. TRAGUIN Premium Luxury Proposal • OD-008 5 SPECIAL TRAGUIN HIGHLIGHTS TRAGUIN Signature Experience: Private temple priest escort at Puri Jagannath Temple to ensure smooth, respectful VIP entry and specialized darshan assistance. Curated by TRAGUIN Experts: Perfect balance of daily driving distances and early afternoon check-ins, ideal for premium relaxation. Premium Handpicked Hotels: Properties selected based on exceptional reviews, safety, beachfront access, and superior culinary excellence. Luxury Transportation: Chauffeurs fluent in multiple languages who double as expert navigators for hidden local food stops. Personalized Assistance: Immediate, smooth digital checking assistance at every single hotel desk. SHOPPING & LOCAL EXPERIENCES Local Markets & Souvenirs: Bring home legendary Sambalpuri and Ikkat handloom silk sarees directly from the weavers. Odisha is also celebrated for gorgeous silver filigree jewelry from Cuttack, Pipili applique wall-hangings, stone-carved mini statues, and beautiful Pattachitra painting scrolls. Cafes & Food Recommendations: Indulge in warm, authentic Chhena Poda (Odisha's iconic caramelized cottage-cheese dessert). Don't miss out on fresh, premium ocean prawn curries along the Puri marine drive or experiencing the sacred temple Mahaprasad lunch experience. IMPORTANT NOTES & BOOKING INFORMATION Hotel Policies: Standard check-in is 14:00 hrs, and check-out is 11:00 hrs. Early check-in or late check-out is subject to room availability. Weather Notes: The best time to visit Odisha is between October and March when the coastal climate is beautifully cool and comfortable. Advance Booking Suggestions: Due to heavy luxury demand for premium beachfront inventory in Puri, we strongly advise making bookings 30-45 days prior to travel. Temple Dress Codes: Please note that leather items (belts, wallets) are strictly banned inside the main temple premises, and conservative attire is highly recommended. TRAGUIN PREMIUM TRAVEL | LUXURY HOLIDAYS | CORPORATE MICE | HONEYMOON EXPERTS | FAMILY VACATIONS • • • • • • • • • TRAGUIN Premium Luxury Proposal • OD-008 6

Your private luxury vehicle will ensure a smooth, comfortable drive back to Bhubaneswar. If time permits, visit the beautiful Raghurajpur Heritage Crafts Village en route to view authentic Gotipua dance rehearsals. Arrive at Bhubaneswar Airport or Railway Station for your onward journey, taking home unforgettable memories crafted to perfection by TRAGUIN.

Luxury Transportation: All transfers, intercity cruising, and sightseeing via private AC Innova Crysta.

TRAGUIN Support: 24/7 VIP assistance with a dedicated destination guest relations manager.
Welcome Amenities: Cold-pressed standard arrival refreshments and customized family travel kit.
Complimentary Experiences: Private premium boat charter ride for dolphin-spotting at Chilika Lake.
Assistance & Taxes: Tolls, fuel charges, state permits, chauffeur allowance, and all applicable resort taxes.
Sightseeing Access: Pre-arranged seamless logistical routing across all mentioned landmarks.
